claim: How-to note: The plan says task lifecycle commands fail on stale/missing/orphan/ungrounded finishes; review settlement holds/merges/demotes unsafe or duplicate memory; git_sync is a dry-run classifier; auto_sync is bounded by allowed_paths, sensitivity scan, and path policy; public data safety blocks raw transcripts/secrets; verify:goal includes lifecycle, data hooks, public safety.

evidence.snippet: The plan says task lifecycle commands fail on stale/missing/orphan/ungrounded finishes; review settlement holds/merges/demotes unsafe or duplicate memory; git_sync is a dry-run classifier; auto_sync is bounded by allowed_paths, sensitivity scan, and path policy; public data safety blocks raw transcripts/secrets; verify:goal includes lifecycle, data hooks, public safety.
